description: CO2 emissions, fuel economy, measurement norms, and environmental benchmarks for registered Danish passenger cars.

targets.query: FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _co2_g_per_km_primaer IS NOT NULL AND _co2_g_per_km_primaer > 0 | STATS cars_with_co2 = COUNT(*)

FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _drivkraft_primaer != "El" AND _co2_g_per_km_primaer > 0 AND _co2_g_per_km_primaer < 500 | EVAL co2_clean = CLAMP(_co2_g_per_km_primaer, 1, 500) | STATS avg_co2_g_per_km = AVG(co2_clean)

FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND (_drivkraft_primaer == "El" OR _drivkraft_primaer == "Plugin hybrid") | STATS zero_emission_cars = COUNT(*)
FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _maale_norm_primaer == "WLTP" | STATS wltp_measured_cars = COUNT(*)

FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _drivkraft_primaer != "El" AND _km_per_liter_primaer > 0 AND _km_per_liter_primaer < 50 | EVAL fuel_eco = CLAMP(_km_per_liter_primaer, 1, 50) | STATS avg_km_per_liter = AVG(fuel_eco)

FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= ${year_from} AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= ${year_to} AND _drivkraft_primaer != "El" AND _co2_g_per_km_primaer > 0 AND _co2_g_per_km_primaer < 500 | EVAL year_date = TO_DATETIME(CONCAT(TO_STRING(_foerste_registrering_aar), "-01-01")), co2_clean = CLAMP(_co2_g_per_km_primaer, 1, 500) | STATS avg_co2_g_per_km = AVG(co2_clean) BY year_date | SORT year_date ASC

panels.title: CO2 Trend by First Registration Year (Non-Electric)

targets.query: FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= ${year_from} AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= ${year_to} AND _drivkraft_primaer IS NOT NULL AND _drivkraft_primaer != "El" AND _co2_g_per_km_primaer > 0 AND _co2_g_per_km_primaer < 500 | EVAL co2_clean = CLAMP(_co2_g_per_km_primaer, 1, 500) | STATS cars = COUNT(*), avg_co2_g_per_km = AVG(co2_clean) BY fuel = _drivkraft_primaer | WHERE cars >= 100 | SORT avg_co2_g_per_km ASC | LIMIT 10

FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND ("${fuel}" == "All" OR _drivkraft_primaer == "${fuel}") AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= ${year_from} AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= ${year_to} AND _co2_g_per_km_primaer > 0 AND _co2_g_per_km_primaer < 500 | EVAL co2_tier = CASE(_co2_g_per_km_primaer < 50, "<50 g/km", _co2_g_per_km_primaer < 100, "50-99 g/km", _co2_g_per_km_primaer < 130, "100-129 g/km", _co2_g_per_km_primaer < 160, "130-159 g/km", _co2_g_per_km_primaer < 200, "160-199 g/km", "200+ g/km") | STATS cars = COUNT(*) BY co2_tier | SORT cars DESC

FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND ("${fuel}" == "All" OR _drivkraft_primaer == "${fuel}") AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= ${year_from} AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= ${year_to} AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KarrosseriTypeStruktur.KarrosseriTypeNavn.keyword IS NOT NULL AND _drivkraft_primaer != "El" AND _co2_g_per_km_primaer > 0 AND _co2_g_per_km_primaer < 500 | EVAL co2_clean = CLAMP(_co2_g_per_km_primaer, 1, 500) | STATS cars = COUNT(*), avg_co2_g_per_km = AVG(co2_clean) BY body_style = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KarrosseriTypeStruktur.KarrosseriTypeNavn.keyword | WHERE cars >= 500 | SORT avg_co2_g_per_km ASC | LIMIT 15

FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND ("${fuel}" == "All" OR _drivkraft_primaer == "${fuel}") AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= ${year_from} AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= ${year_to} AND _maale_norm_primaer IS NOT NULL | STATS cars = COUNT(*) BY maale_norm = _maale_norm_primaer | SORT cars DESC | LIMIT 15

FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= ${year_from} AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= ${year_to} AND _drivkraft_primaer != "El" AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword IS NOT NULL AND _co2_g_per_km_primaer > 0 AND _co2_g_per_km_primaer < 500 | EVAL co2_clean = CLAMP(_co2_g_per_km_primaer, 1, 500) | STATS cars = COUNT(*), avg_co2_g_per_km = AVG(co2_clean) BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword | WHERE cars >= 100 | SORT avg_co2_g_per_km ASC | LIMIT 25

FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= ${year_from} AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= ${year_to} AND _drivkraft_primaer != "El" AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword IS NOT NULL AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.Model.KoeretoejModelTypeNavn.keyword IS NOT NULL AND _co2_g_per_km_primaer > 0 AND _co2_g_per_km_primaer < 500 | EVAL co2_clean = CLAMP(_co2_g_per_km_primaer, 1, 500) | STATS cars = COUNT(*), avg_co2_g_per_km = AVG(co2_clean) BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword, model = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.Model.KoeretoejModelTypeNavn.keyword | WHERE cars >= 50 | SORT avg_co2_g_per_km DESC | LIMIT 25

FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND ("${fuel}" == "All" OR _drivkraft_primaer == "${fuel}") AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= ${year_from} AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= ${year_to} AND _drivkraft_primaer != "El" AND _co2_g_per_km_primaer > 0 AND _co2_g_per_km_primaer < 500 | EVAL co2_clean = CLAMP(_co2_g_per_km_primaer, 1, 500), decade = CASE(_foerste_registrering_aar < 1980, "Before 1980", _foerste_registrering_aar < 1990, "1980s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2000, "1990s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2010, "2000s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2020, "2010s", "2020s") | STATS cars = COUNT(*), avg_co2_g_per_km = AVG(co2_clean) BY decade | SORT decade ASC | LIMIT 10

title: DMR Environmental Profile
